core_idea: The Barber of La Manchaland Outis is a Support / Status Specialist / Damage Dealer applying sustained Bleed, Bloodfeast pressure with consistent skill stats.
playstyle_guide:
- Hold S3 for when At 10+ Blood — tinged Scissorblades is met — that condition is what unlocks its full damage ceiling.

**S1 — Sewing** (BP 3, CP +4, x2): rolls — low 3, high 11 (Low / Slightly High stacked).
- On Hit with this Skill: heal 10% of the HP damage dealt (max 10) ; [On Use] Consume up to 40 Bloodfeast and gain 1 Blood — tinged Scissorblades for every 8 Bloodfeast this unit consumed ; - If this unit failed to consume Bloodfeast, gain +2 Bleed Count ; [On Use] Coin Power +1 for every 6 Bleed on target (max 2)
- Inflict 1 Bleed; [On Hit] If target has Sewing Target, inflict +1 Bleed Count

**S2 — Scission** (BP 4, CP +4, x3): rolls — low 4, high 16 (Slightly Low).
- Peak output requires both conditions: On Hit with this Skill: heal 20% of the HP damage dealt (max 20) | [On Use] Consume up to 60 Bloodfeast and gain 1 Blood — tinged Scissorblades for every 6 Bloodfeast this unit consumed.
- At 10+ Blood — tinged Scissorblades, inflict 1 Sewing Target on target next turn

**S3 — I'll Make You a New Dress!** (BP 3, CP +3, x4): rolls — low 3, high 15 (Low).
- Peak output requires both conditions: On Hit with this Skill: heal 30% of the HP damage dealt (max 20) | [Before Attack] At 10+ Blood — tinged Scissorblades, Atk Weight +1.
- Delay until 5+ Bleed on target — that is when the damage condition activates.

Combat passive — **Bloodfeast**: If this unit is on field, or is one of the units that can appear on this Stage, increase Bloodfeast value by the amount of Bleed damage c….
  - When this unit enters the field, the sleeping blood drenching the battlefield will rise above the surface.

Combat passive — **Don Quixote Hardblood Arts 8: Scissors**: 1 ally with the fastest Speed: If the enemy is killed at Attack End, heal 10 HP (2 times per turn).
  - 1 ally with the fastest Speed: If the enemy is killed at Attack End, inflict +1 Bleed Count when inflicting Bleed Potency with Skill or C….

Defense skill — **Counter: Quite Discourteous!**: [On Use] At 10+ Blood — tinged Scissorblades, Base Power +1.
  - At 20+ Blood — tinged Scissorblades, Base Power +2 instead.
  - [On Use] Coin Power +1 for every 5 Bleed on self (max 3).
team_suggestions: Best placed in a Bleed-focused team — teammates that apply or extend Bleed increase this kit's damage ceiling.
- **Kurokumo Clan Captain Ishmael**: 'Gathering Dark Clouds' inflicts Bleed via the support passive — helps reach 6+ Bleed thresholds on key skills.
- **N Corp. E.G.O::Contempt, Awe Ryōshū**: '@#$'s Hand I Let Slip' inflicts Bleed via the support passive — helps reach 6+ Bleed thresholds on key skills.
- **Shi Assoc. East Section 3 Faust**: 'Aiming for the Bullseye' inflicts Bleed via the support passive — helps reach 6+ Bleed thresholds on key skills.
